breaking.title: Congress passes war powers measure for first time, rebuking Trump's war with Iran
breaking.summary: The resolution is largely symbolic, but it adds to pressure on the White House to end the conflict once and for all.

breaking.title: Bondi Beach shooting hero pleads not guilty to alleged assault on his father
breaking.summary: Ahmed al Ahmed tackled one of the gunmen who killed 15 people at a Jewish event in December.

breaking.title: Israel targeted Gaza children resulting in genocide, UN inquiry says
breaking.summary: Around 30% of those killed in the Gaza war were children, the report ‌found

breaking.title: Zohran Mamdani-backed candidates excel in congressional primaries
breaking.summary: Zohran Mamdani’s slate of candidates with ties to the Democratic Socialists of America swept out area ​incumbent Democrats in a stunning win for the 34-year-old mayor

breaking.title: Ujjain land 'scam': Congress's allegations against CM Mohan Yadav baseless, says BJP
breaking.summary: The Opposition Congress has termed the alleged land scam in Ujjain as "plunder of Mahakal's land" and demanded the resignation of Chief Minister Mohan Yadav

breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Iran's nuclear sites likely to be inspected, IAEA chief says 'going to happen'
breaking.summary: Marco Rubio is in the UAE to ease concerns over tentative Iran deal; U.S. Senate approves War Powers resolution

breaking.title: Andhra Pradesh strikes gold with Jonnagiri mine, eyes more projects
breaking.summary: Commercial production begins at Jonnagiri in Kurnool district as the State prepares to auction several gold-bearing blocks in Chittoor and Anantapuramu to boost investment and employment

breaking.title: Vedanta may have a couple more tranches of promoter-driven selling; stock likely to bounce back in 1-2 weeks: Ambareesh Baliga
breaking.summary: Vedanta shares saw a significant drop following a large block deal, but analysts suggest the selloff is temporary. Promoter entity Twin Star Holdings is reportedly behind the sale, aiming to reduce debt. Experts believe the stock could rebound soon, with the company's operational fundamentals remaining strong. Beyond Vedanta, market strategist Ambareesh Baliga also shared insights on defence, textiles, and the auto sector.
